title: Sweet Crispy Mexican Spinach Salad
description: A light, Whole30-friendly salad featuring blanched spinach, roasted poblano, fresh mango, and a zesty limecilantro dressing.
instructions: Blanch spinach: bring a pot of salted water to a boil, add spinach, cook 1‑2 minutes until wilted, drain and immediately transfer to an ice bath to stop cooking.
Pat spinach dry and transfer to a baking sheet, drizzle with avocado oil, season with a pinch of salt, and roast for 8‑10 minutes until edges are crisp.
While spinach roasts, heat a small skillet over medium heat, add a splash of avocado oil, and sauté diced poblano until softened and slightly charred, about 5 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together lime juice, chopped cilantro, minced garlic, grated ginger, and a pinch of salt to make the dressing.
Once spinach is crisp, toss with the avocado oil, then add roasted poblano, diced mango, and toasted pepitas.
Drizzle the lime‑cilantro dressing over the mixture, toss gently to combine, and serve immediately.
